tasks.label: format
tasks.command: npm run format

tasks.label: test
tasks.command: npm run ci:verify

tasks.label: build-dist-once
tasks.command: npm

tasks.label: build web app
tasks.command: npm run build

tasks.label: check bubblewrap
tasks.command: bubblewrap --version

tasks.label: check bubblewrap cmd
tasks.command: bubblewrap.cmd --version

tasks.label: check live manifest response
tasks.command: curl.exe -L -I https://agentmode.dev/manifest.webmanifest ; curl.exe -L https://agentmode.dev/manifest.webmanifest

tasks.label: check www manifest response
tasks.command: curl.exe -L -I https://www.agentmode.dev/manifest.webmanifest ; curl.exe -L https://www.agentmode.dev/manifest.webmanifest

tasks.label: bubblewrap init help
tasks.command: bubblewrap.cmd init --help

tasks.label: bubblewrap help
tasks.command: bubblewrap.cmd help

tasks.label: bubblewrap init ai horizon android
tasks.command: Set-Location c:\temp\ai-horizon-android; bubblewrap.cmd init --manifest=https://www.agentmode.dev/manifest.webmanifest

tasks.label: locate bubblewrap package
tasks.command:
Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA
pm
ode_modules" -Directory | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName; Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA
pm
ode_modules" -Recurse -Filter "*bubblewrap*" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 40 -ExpandProperty FullName

tasks.label: search bubblewrap init flags
tasks.command: Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\npm\node_modules\@bubblewrap\cli" -Recurse -Include *.js,*.ts,*.json -File | Select-String -Pattern "--manifest|applicationId|packageId|displayMode|signingKey|inquirer|prompts" | Select-Object -First 120 | ForEach-Object { "$($_.Path):$($_.LineNumber): $($_.Line.Trim())" }

tasks.label: search bubblewrap init flags fixed
tasks.command: Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\npm\node_modules\@bubblewrap\cli" -Recurse -Include *.js,*.ts,*.json -File | Select-String -Pattern "--manifest|applicationId|packageId|displayMode|signingKey|inquirer|prompts" | Select-Object -First 160 | ForEach-Object { '{0}:{1}: {2}' -f $_.Path, $_.LineNumber, $_.Line.Trim() }

tasks.label: search bubblewrap init flags quoted
tasks.command: $pattern = '--manifest|applicationId|packageId|displayMode|signingKey|inquirer|prompts'; Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\npm\node_modules\@bubblewrap\cli" -Recurse -Include *.js,*.ts,*.json -File | Select-String -Pattern $pattern | Select-Object -First 160 | ForEach-Object { '{0}:{1}: {2}' -f $_.Path, $_.LineNumber, $_.Line.Trim() }

tasks.label: find existing keystores
tasks.command: Get-ChildItem c:\temp,$env:USERPROFILE -Recurse -Include *.jks,*.keystore,android-keystore -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 50 -ExpandProperty FullName

tasks.label: bubblewrap init noninteractive
tasks.command: if (Test-Path c:\temp\ai-horizon-android) { Remove-Item c:\temp\ai-horizon-android -Recurse -Force }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path c:\temp\ai-horizon-android | Out-Null; Set-Location c:\temp\ai-horizon-android; $answers = @('', '', '', '', 'dev.agentmode.aihorizon', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', 'n') -join "`n"; $answers | bubblewrap.cmd init --manifest=https://www.agentmode.dev/manifest.webmanifest

tasks.label: bubblewrap init noninteractive fixed
tasks.command: if (Test-Path c:\temp\ai-horizon-android) { Remove-Item c:\temp\ai-horizon-android -Recurse -Force }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path c:\temp\ai-horizon-android | Out-Null; Set-Location c:\temp\ai-horizon-android; $nl = [Environment]::NewLine; $answers = @('', '', '', '', 'dev.agentmode.aihorizon', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', 'n') -join $nl; $answers | bubblewrap.cmd init --manifest=https://www.agentmode.dev/manifest.webmanifest

tasks.label: generate android wrapper
tasks.command: if (Test-Path c:\temp\ai-horizon-android-build) { Remove-Item c:\temp\ai-horizon-android-build -Recurse -Force }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path c:\temp\ai-horizon-android-build | Out-Null; node c:\temp\ai-horizon\scripts\init-bubblewrap-noninteractive.cjs c:\temp\ai-horizon-android-build

tasks.label: regenerate android wrapper
tasks.command: if (Test-Path c:\temp\ai-horizon-android-build) { Remove-Item c:\temp\ai-horizon-android-build -Recurse -Force }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path c:\temp\ai-horizon-android-build | Out-Null; node c:\temp\ai-horizon\scripts\init-bubblewrap-noninteractive.cjs c:\temp\ai-horizon-android-build

tasks.label: bubblewrap release build
tasks.command: Set-Location c:\temp\ai-horizon-android-build; $env:BUBBLEWRAP_KEYSTORE_PASSWORD='aihorizon-local-build-only'; $env:BUBBLEWRAP_KEY_PASSWORD='aihorizon-local-build-only'; bubblewrap.cmd build

tasks.label: bubblewrap release build retry
tasks.command: Set-Location c:\temp\ai-horizon-android-build; $env:BUBBLEWRAP_KEYSTORE_PASSWORD='aihorizon-local-build-only'; $env:BUBBLEWRAP_KEY_PASSWORD='aihorizon-local-build-only'; bubblewrap.cmd build

tasks.label: check java installations
tasks.command: java -version; where.exe java; Get-ChildItem 'C:\Program Files\Java','C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium','C:\Program Files\Microsoft','C:\Program Files\Android' -Recurse -Filter java.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 30 -ExpandProperty FullName

tasks.label: check bubblewrap java
tasks.command: & 'C:\Users\bstra\.bubblewrap\jdk\jdk-11.0.9.1+1\bin\java.exe' -XshowSettings:properties -version 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern 'os.arch|sun.arch.data.model|java.version|java.vendor'; & 'C:\Users\bstra\.bubblewrap\jdk\jdk-11.0.9.1+1\bin\java.exe' -Xmx2048m -version

tasks.label: check winget
tasks.command: winget --version

tasks.label: check chocolatey

tasks.command: winget install EclipseAdoptium.Temurin.11.JDK --accept-package-agreements --accept-source-agreements --silent

tasks.label: locate temurin java
tasks.command: Get-ChildItem 'C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium','C:\Program Files\Java' -Recurse -Filter java.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 20 -ExpandProperty FullName

tasks.label: bubblewrap release build 64bit jdk
tasks.command: Set-Location c:\temp\ai-horizon-android-build; $env:BUBBLEWRAP_KEYSTORE_PASSWORD='aihorizon-local-build-only'; $env:BUBBLEWRAP_KEY_PASSWORD='aihorizon-local-build-only'; bubblewrap.cmd build

tasks.label: copy and verify aab
tasks.command: Set-Location c:\temp\ai-horizon-android-build; Copy-Item -Force .\app-release-bundle.aab .\app-release.aab; Get-Item .\app-release.aab, .\app-release-bundle.aab, .\app-release-signed.apk | Select-Object FullName, Length, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize

tasks.label: rebuild aab min sdk 21
tasks.command: Set-Location c:\temp\ai-horizon-android-build; $env:BUBBLEWRAP_KEYSTORE_PASSWORD='aihorizon-local-build-only'; $env:BUBBLEWRAP_KEY_PASSWORD='aihorizon-local-build-only'; bubblewrap.cmd build; Copy-Item -Force .\app-release-bundle.aab .\app-release.aab; Get-Item .\app-release.aab, .\app-release-bundle.aab | Select-Object FullName, Length, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize

tasks.label: refresh checksum rebuild aab
tasks.command: Set-Location c:\temp\ai-horizon-android-build; (Get-FileHash .\twa-manifest.json -Algorithm SHA1).Hash.ToLowerInvariant() | Set-Content -NoNewline .\manifest-checksum.txt; $env:BUBBLEWRAP_KEYSTORE_PASSWORD='aihorizon-local-build-only'; $env:BUBBLEWRAP_KEY_PASSWORD='aihorizon-local-build-only'; bubblewrap.cmd build; if (Test-Path .\app-release-bundle.aab) { Copy-Item -Force .\app-release-bundle.aab .\app-release.aab }; Get-Item .\app-release.aab, .\app-release-bundle.aab -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName, Length, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize

tasks.label: verify min sdk filesystem
tasks.command: Set-Location c:\temp\ai-horizon-android-build; Select-String -Path .\twa-manifest.json, .\app\build.gradle -Pattern 'minSdkVersion' | ForEach-Object { '{0}:{1}: {2}' -f $_.Path, $_.LineNumber, $_.Line.Trim() }; Get-ChildItem . -Filter *.aab | Select-Object FullName, Length, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize; Get-ChildItem .\app\build -Recurse -Filter AndroidManifest.xml -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 20 -ExpandProperty FullName

tasks.label: rebuild aab version code 2
tasks.command: Set-Location c:\temp\ai-horizon-android-build; (Get-FileHash .\twa-manifest.json -Algorithm SHA1).Hash.ToLowerInvariant() | Set-Content -NoNewline .\manifest-checksum.txt; $env:BUBBLEWRAP_KEYSTORE_PASSWORD='aihorizon-local-build-only'; $env:BUBBLEWRAP_KEY_PASSWORD='aihorizon-local-build-only'; bubblewrap.cmd build; if (Test-Path .\app-release-bundle.aab) { Copy-Item -Force .\app-release-bundle.aab .\app-release.aab }; Get-Item .\app-release.aab, .\app-release-bundle.aab | Select-Object FullName, Length, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize

tasks.label: verify version code all manifests
tasks.command: Set-Location c:\temp\ai-horizon-android-build; Select-String -Path .\twa-manifest.json, .\app\build.gradle -Pattern 'appVersion|versionCode|versionName|minSdkVersion' | ForEach-Object { '{0}:{1}: {2}' -f $_.Path, $_.LineNumber, $_.Line.Trim() }; Get-ChildItem .\app\build -Recurse -Filter AndroidManifest.xml | ForEach-Object { $m = Select-String -Path $_.FullName -Pattern 'versionCode|versionName|minSdkVersion' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($m) { '--- ' + $_.FullName; $m | ForEach-Object { $_.Line.Trim() } } }

tasks.label: list android sdk platforms
tasks.command: Get-ChildItem 'C:\Users\bstra\.bubblewrap\android_sdk\platforms' -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name

tasks.label: list sdkmanager
tasks.command: Get-ChildItem 'C:\Users\bstra\.bubblewrap\android_sdk' -Recurse -Filter sdkmanager.bat -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5 -ExpandProperty FullName

tasks.label: install android api 35
tasks.command: $env:JAVA_HOME='C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-11.0.31.11-hotspot'; $env:PATH="$env:JAVA_HOME\bin;$env:PATH"; & 'C:\Users\bstra\.bubblewrap\android_sdk\tools\bin\sdkmanager.bat' 'platforms;android-35' 'build-tools;35.0.0'

tasks.label: install android api 35 fixed
tasks.command: $env:JAVA_HOME='C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-11.0.31.11-hotspot'; $env:PATH=($env:JAVA_HOME + '\bin;' + $env:PATH); & 'C:\Users\bstra\.bubblewrap\android_sdk\tools\bin\sdkmanager.bat' 'platforms;android-35' 'build-tools;35.0.0'

tasks.label: install api 35 sdk root
tasks.command: $env:JAVA_HOME='C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-11.0.31.11-hotspot'; $env:PATH=($env:JAVA_HOME + '\bin;' + $env:PATH); & 'C:\Users\bstra\.bubblewrap\android_sdk\tools\bin\sdkmanager.bat' --sdk_root='C:\Users\bstra\.bubblewrap\android_sdk' 'platforms;android-35' 'build-tools;35.0.0'

tasks.label: confirm api 35 installed

tasks.label: rebuild aab api 35 vc3
tasks.command: Set-Location c:\temp\ai-horizon-android-build; (Get-FileHash .\twa-manifest.json -Algorithm SHA1).Hash.ToLowerInvariant() | Set-Content -NoNewline .\manifest-checksum.txt; $env:BUBBLEWRAP_KEYSTORE_PASSWORD='aihorizon-local-build-only'; $env:BUBBLEWRAP_KEY_PASSWORD='aihorizon-local-build-only'; bubblewrap.cmd build; if (Test-Path .\app-release-bundle.aab) { Copy-Item -Force .\app-release-bundle.aab .\app-release.aab }; Get-Item .\app-release.aab, .\app-release-bundle.aab | Select-Object FullName, Length, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize

tasks.label: check aab after api35
tasks.command: Set-Location c:\temp\ai-horizon-android-build; Get-Item .\app-release.aab, .\app-release-bundle.aab -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName, Length, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize

tasks.label: check jdk17 installed
tasks.command: Get-ChildItem 'C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium','C:\Program Files\Java' -Recurse -Filter java.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName

tasks.label: install temurin jdk 17
tasks.command: winget install EclipseAdoptium.Temurin.17.JDK --accept-package-agreements --accept-source-agreements --silent

tasks.label: locate jdk17 after install
tasks.command: Get-ChildItem 'C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium' -Recurse -Filter java.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName

tasks.label: download portable jdk17
tasks.command: $url='https://github.com/adoptium/temurin17-binaries/releases/download/jdk-17.0.19%2B10/OpenJDK17U-jdk_x64_windows_hotspot_17.0.19_10.zip'; $zip='C:\Users\bstra\.bubblewrap\jdk17.zip'; $dest='C:\Users\bstra\.bubblewrap\jdk17'; if (Test-Path $dest) { Remove-Item $dest -Recurse -Force }; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -OutFile $zip; Expand-Archive -Path $zip -DestinationPath $dest -Force; Get-ChildItem $dest -Recurse -Filter java.exe | Select-Object -First 5 -ExpandProperty FullName

tasks.label: verify portable jdk17
tasks.command: Get-ChildItem 'C:\Users\bstra\.bubblewrap\jdk17' -Recurse -Filter java.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 10 -ExpandProperty FullName; Get-Item 'C:\Users\bstra\.bubblewrap\jdk17.zip' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName,Length

tasks.label: extract portable jdk17
tasks.command: $zip='C:\Users\bstra\.bubblewrap\jdk17.zip'; $dest='C:\Users\bstra\.bubblewrap\jdk17'; if (Test-Path $dest) { Remove-Item $dest -Recurse -Force }; Expand-Archive -Path $zip -DestinationPath $dest -Force; $java=(Get-ChildItem $dest -Recurse -Filter java.exe | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty FullName); & $java -version; Split-Path (Split-Path $java -Parent) -Parent

tasks.label: check locks and jdk17
tasks.command: Get-Process powershell,msiexec,winget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,ProcessName,StartTime,Path | Format-Table -AutoSize; Get-ChildItem 'C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium' -Recurse -Filter java.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName

tasks.label: stop stuck installers
tasks.command: Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { ($_.Name -in @('winget.exe','msiexec.exe')) -or ($_.Name -eq 'powershell.exe' -and $_.CommandLine -like '*jdk17.zip*') } | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "Stopping $($_.ProcessId) $($_.Name)"; Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }

tasks.label: download extract jdk17 fresh
tasks.command: $url='https://github.com/adoptium/temurin17-binaries/releases/download/jdk-17.0.19%2B10/OpenJDK17U-jdk_x64_windows_hotspot_17.0.19_10.zip'; $zip='C:\Users\bstra\.bubblewrap\jdk17-fresh.zip'; $dest='C:\Users\bstra\.bubblewrap\jdk17'; if (Test-Path $zip) { Remove-Item $zip -Force }; if (Test-Path $dest) { Remove-Item $dest -Recurse -Force }; curl.exe -L $url -o $zip; Expand-Archive -Path $zip -DestinationPath $dest -Force; $java=(Get-ChildItem $dest -Recurse -Filter java.exe | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty FullName); & $java -version; Split-Path (Split-Path $java -Parent) -Parent

tasks.label: rebuild api35 agp8
tasks.command: Set-Location c:\temp\ai-horizon-android-build; Remove-Item .\app-release.aab, .\app-release-bundle.aab, .\app-release-signed.apk -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; (Get-FileHash .\twa-manifest.json -Algorithm SHA1).Hash.ToLowerInvariant() | Set-Content -NoNewline .\manifest-checksum.txt; $env:BUBBLEWRAP_KEYSTORE_PASSWORD='aihorizon-local-build-only'; $env:BUBBLEWRAP_KEY_PASSWORD='aihorizon-local-build-only'; bubblewrap.cmd build; if (Test-Path .\app-release-bundle.aab) { Copy-Item -Force .\app-release-bundle.aab .\app-release.aab }; Get-Item .\app-release.aab, .\app-release-bundle.aab -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName, Length, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize

tasks.command: Set-Location c:\temp\ai-horizon-android-build; Select-String -Path .\app\build\intermediates\bundle_manifest\release\AndroidManifest.xml, .\app\build\intermediates\merged_manifest\release\out\AndroidManifest.xml -Pattern 'versionCode|versionName|minSdkVersion|targetSdkVersion' | ForEach-Object { '{0}: {1}' -f $_.Path, $_.Line.Trim() }; Get-Item .\app-release.aab | Select-Object FullName, Length, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize

tasks.label: find bundletool

tasks.label: inspect aab zip entries

tasks.label: list build manifest times
tasks.command: Set-Location c:\temp\ai-horizon-android-build; Get-ChildItem .\app\build -Recurse -Filter AndroidManifest.xml | Select-Object FullName,Length,LastWriteTime | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Format-Table -AutoSize

tasks.label: dump aab manifest aapt2
tasks.command: Set-Location c:\temp\ai-horizon-android-build; & 'C:\Users\bstra\.bubblewrap\android_sdk\build-tools\35.0.0\aapt2.exe' dump xmltree .\app-release.aab base/manifest/AndroidManifest.xml | Select-String -Pattern 'versionCode|versionName|minSdkVersion|targetSdkVersion'

tasks.label: extract dump aab manifest
tasks.command: Set-Location c:\temp\ai-horizon-android-build; if (Test-Path .\aab-check) { Remove-Item .\aab-check -Recurse -Force }; New-Item -ItemType Directory .\aab-check | Out-Null; tar -xf .\app-release.aab -C .\aab-check base/manifest/AndroidManifest.xml; & 'C:\Users\bstra\.bubblewrap\android_sdk\build-tools\35.0.0\aapt2.exe' dump xmltree --file .\aab-check\base\manifest\AndroidManifest.xml | Select-String -Pattern 'versionCode|versionName|minSdkVersion|targetSdkVersion'

tasks.label: show manifest paths full
tasks.command: Set-Location c:\temp\ai-horizon-android-build; Get-ChildItem .\app\build -Recurse -Filter AndroidManifest.xml | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | ForEach-Object { '---'; $_.FullName; $_.LastWriteTime; Select-String -Path $_.FullName -Pattern 'versionCode|versionName|minSdkVersion|targetSdkVersion' | ForEach-Object { $_.Line.Trim() } }

tasks.label: dump aab manifest corrected
tasks.command: Set-Location c:\temp\ai-horizon-android-build; & 'C:\Users\bstra\.bubblewrap\android_sdk\build-tools\35.0.0\aapt2.exe' dump xmltree --file base/manifest/AndroidManifest.xml .\app-release.aab | Select-String -Pattern 'versionCode|versionName|minSdkVersion|targetSdkVersion'

tasks.command: Set-Location c:\temp\ai-horizon-android-build; Remove-Item .\app-release.aab, .\app-release-bundle.aab, .\app-release-signed.apk -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $env:BUBBLEWRAP_KEYSTORE_PASSWORD='aihorizon-local-build-only'; $env:BUBBLEWRAP_KEY_PASSWORD='aihorizon-local-build-only'; bubblewrap.cmd build; if (Test-Path .\app-release-bundle.aab) { Copy-Item -Force .\app-release-bundle.aab .\app-release.aab }; Get-Item .\app-release.aab, .\app-release-bundle.aab -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName, Length, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize

tasks.label: verify final vc4 metadata
tasks.command: Set-Location c:\temp\ai-horizon-android-build; Get-ChildItem .\app\build\intermediates -Recurse -Filter AndroidManifest.xml | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 4 | ForEach-Object { '---'; $_.FullName; Select-String -Path $_.FullName -Pattern 'versionCode|versionName|minSdkVersion|targetSdkVersion' | ForEach-Object { $_.Line.Trim() } }; Select-String -Path .\app\build.gradle, .\build.gradle, .\gradle\wrapper\gradle-wrapper.properties -Pattern 'androidbrowserhelper|compileSdkVersion|targetSdkVersion|versionCode|versionName|com.android.tools.build|distributionUrl'
